body_md: Seed dataset is intentionally limited to the public ministry of [[person:jesus-of-nazareth]]. Places like [[place:galilee]] and [[place:jerusalem]] are included only insofar as they are needed for ministry-period claims.

Primary evidence in this starter set is weighted toward the canonical Gospels. [[source:src-josephus-ant]] is included as a contextual non-Christian witness for [[person:john-the-baptist]] and [[person:pontius-pilate]].
